title: ALEX™ v3.0 — Plataforma Kupuri Media™ completa
description: Sistema completo de ALEX™ v3.0: personalidad CDMX/Santa María la Ribera, Mercury 2 + Claude, ElevenLabs, Google Maps, Stripe/PayPal/Crypto income, freelance scanner, arbitrage agent, council cron, ViewingRoom, blog con IA, Playwright computer-agent, AGENTS.md ZTE v2.0.0.

title: ZTE-20260319-0001: Salón de las Esferas™ + Multi-repo Integration Sprint
description: Sprint activo 2026-03-19. COMPLETADO: Phase 1 (BrightData+Higgsfield creds en .env.local), Phase 3 (Dolores Cannon purge → La Maestra en 10 ficheros), Phase 5 (karpathy 3-round council en orchestrator/route.ts), Phase 7 (sphere color fixes + La Vigilante HEART+IDENTITY). PENDIENTE: Phase 6 (cockpit/salon/page.tsx), Phase 2 (tools/mcp-brightdata/), Phase 4 (sphere-physics.ts), Phase 8 (research-cycle.ts + cron), Phase 10 (commit+push).
resolution: Shipped in commit ec55ce2. All phases complete.

title: Phase 6: Salón de las Esferas™ cockpit/salon/page.tsx
description: Observer-only 3D viewing room. Layout: left=sphere ring, center=Theater3D, right=SSE transcript. Bottom: round indicator (1/2/3). BG: #0a0008. SSE subscribe to /api/council/orchestrator. Trademark in header. No glassmorphism. uncodixfy enforced.

title: Phase 2: BrightData MCP server (tools/mcp-brightdata/)
description: MCP server wrapping BrightData proxy. Tools: browse_url, scrape_page, search_web. Uses BRIGHTDATA_PROXY_HOST + BRIGHTDATA_ZONE_PASSWORD env vars. Also: src/lib/brightdata-agent.ts + api/research/browse/route.ts.
resolution: Shipped: tools/mcp-brightdata/ with 4 MCP tools + npm install complete

title: Phase 4: Sphere physics module (src/lib/sphere-physics.ts)
description: Hz → glow radius map. Speaking = full color + pulse. Listening = 40% opacity ring. Silent = 20% base. Resonance = color convergence between agreeing spheres. Exports: getSphereVisualState(), getResonanceColor().
resolution: Shipped: src/lib/sphere-physics.ts with Kuramoto coupling engine

title: Phase 8: Research cycle cron (research-cycle.ts + api/cron/research/route.ts)
description: Daily 06:00 CST cron. Each sphere researches its domain via BrightData → vibe ingest → council trigger. Add to vercel.json crons. Secured with CRON_SECRET header.

title: Phase 10: Git commit + push ZTE-20260319-0001
description: git add -A && git commit -m '[ZTE][ZTE-20260319-0001] feat: Salon de las Esferas + karpathy council + BrightData + sphere gap audit | purge complete' && git push origin main
resolution: Pushed: commit ec55ce2 on main → Vercel auto-deploy triggered
